title: hsd3B34 and lbmemory
author: TiagoSimionato
body: Hi, it its my first time with decompilation and I would like to help and learn more. I went through the README and docs to try to understand what is going on and chose some functions using objdiff to decomp with `python tools/decomp.py`

title: hsd3B34 and lbmemory
author: decomp-dev[bot]

title: hsd3B34 and lbmemory
author: ribbanya
body: Thanks for the contribution! Unfortunately the functions from `hsd_3B34` were just submitted with higher match scores in #2488, but we can still merge `lbmemory`.
